description: Run 1 baseline: Llama3 8B FSDP=4 TP=2 bs=1 8xH100; c4_test; construct_default_graph_passes returns empty list
remove_identity_views: peephole drop of 2006/3358 aten.view identity nodes (DTensor plumbing); +7.2% tps, -2.0 GiB
drop_unused_sdpa_outputs: removed 0 dead getitems; FX eliminate_dead_code already handles them post Exp 1
reorder_fsdp_all_gather_prefetch (Strategy A): moved 130/421 AGs by avg 3.5 slots; no cross-layer overlap; tps noise-level regression
bucket_qkv_all_gathers: 32 triplets (64 launches saved/step); +0.7% tps (below 1% threshold); Q/K/V are bandwidth-bound at this scale
prefetch_fsdp_all_gathers_cross_layer (Strategy B v1): 290/421 AGs hoisted avg 10.6 slots; prev_wait anchor was intra-layer, not cross-layer; +0.5% noise
prefetch_fsdp_all_gathers_v2 (Strategy B v2, TP-RS-wait anchor): 290/291 hoisted avg 20.5 slots; 1.0 barriers crossed - still intra-layer (anchor lands at mid-layer post-wo); +0.16% noise
remove_identity_ops: 421/421 identity slices + 450/1125 double-t eliminated; +2.4% tps; combined with Exp 1 = +9.8% over raw baseline
prefetch_fsdp_all_gathers_v3 (Strategy B v3, end-of-layer-only): 290/291 AGs hoisted 47 slots / 1.44 barriers; reached target but no overlap won; closing prefetch direction
collapse_views_and_aliases: 1/1352 view-chains (most multi-user), 194/194 detaches, 0 alias/expand; +0.2% noise; metadata cleanup tapped out
cse_views_and_conj: 96 view + 32 _conj + 32 clone CSE'd (matches recon prediction); +0.4% noise; <200 ops/step cleanup confirmed sub-noise
elide_split_cat_for_reduce_scatter: 130/130 cats rewritten as zero-copy views; +1.58% tps; cumulative +11.5% over raw baseline
bucket_param_grad_reduce_scatters: 33 buckets avg 8.82, 291/291 RSes coalesced via reduce_scatter_tensor_coalesced; +0.80% (below 1% threshold)
bucket_fsdp_collectives: AG+RS coalesced (291+291 in 33+33 buckets) w/ producer-chain hoist; +10.4% tps; cumulative +23.1% over raw baseline
fuse_coalesced_input_casts (cat+cast+split fallback): 516 cast launches saved + 194 detaches elided; +0.14% — cat/split overhead canceled the wins
coalesce_all_reduces: all_reduce_coalesced exists, 0 buckets (every wait consumed before next AR, no hoist path); +0.12%
bucket_tp_collectives + detach: 0 TP buckets (structurally un-coalesceable), only 194 detaches removed; +0.37%
cleanup_bundle: 354 ops (detach 194 + view CSE 96 + conj 32 + clone 32, 0 unsafe_view/transpose/mul/add); +0.64% — sub-noise ceiling for cleanup bundles
exp18 open-ended deep-dive: no_target - all 8 hint directions ruled out at <300 ops/step; cumulative +23.1% confirmed local optimum

exp19 backward-graph-only deep-dive: no_target - SDPA bwd outputs all live, fused_rmsnorm_bwd outputs all live, transpose chains all unique, residual adds unique, bwd AG-ws-2 already zero-copy; confirms +23.1% ceiling

exp20 model+scaffolding code review: no_target - FusedQKVLinear exists but config-level only; FFN w1/w3 fusion requires checkpoint changes; compile_config has no exploitable knob; 97 detach-of-detach found but sub-noise
max_cleanup_bundle: 354 ops (_to_copy CSE=0, t.default CSE=0, cascade=0); +0.86% — 8 tps short of threshold; cleanup ceiling confirmed
aggressive_view_chain_shortcut: 1/1482 shortcuts (386 rank_mismatch, 1095 no_inner_view); view-of-view-that-undoes-itself essentially doesn't exist; +0.29%
exp23 batched specks: pass reorder + unsafe_view + t.default + bwd AG-split mirror; all no_target/sub-noise (Exp 11 already absorbed bwd splits)
exp24 profile-driven: top 5 kernels - NCCL coalesced AG/RS done, SDPA/GEMM compute-only, FillFunctor 3065/step from --debug.deterministic (invisible to FX, ~7% step overhead)
exp25 addmm fusion: 0 direct add(c,mm(a,b)) patterns - mm always flows through view/wait_tensor before any add
stability re-bench (median of 3: 5137/5135/5125); within 0.3% of original Exp 13 measurement
exp26 iterative identity passes: 0 new candidates iter2/iter3 - bucketing is pure relocation, not structure-creator; fixed point confirmed
NEW BASELINE: dropped --debug.deterministic from run_benchmark.sh (per user) - recovers 7% NaN-fill overhead; numerics test still passes (own determinism setup)
cleanup_bundle (Exp 17 redux): 354 ops removed (detach 194 + view 96 + conj 32 + clone 32); +1.71% in non-det mode (vs +0.64% in det); dispatch-overhead win is real
foreach_cast_via_cat (Exp 14 redux): 33+33 buckets fused, -0.17%; cat+split overhead ≈ 516 launch savings regardless of det mode
exp29 re-profile non-det: top kernels NCCL TP RS bf16 183ms, AG mix 177ms, FSDP RS 123ms, GEMMs 155ms - no FX-targetable hot kernel
exp30 global_weight_prefetch: 33 AGs hoisted avg 1696 slots; +0.08% confirms FX reorder doesn't add overlap beyond Exp 13's per-layer hoist
exp31 fused activation ops: no SwiGLU op exists in PyTorch; aten.glu is sigmoid-based not SwiGLU; only aten.silu (single op)
exp32 coalesce_gamma_grad_ARs: structural blocker - γ-grad wait consumed by intermediate _to_copy→FSDP_RS chain, not just graph output
exp33 hunt: identified RoPE freq lookup duplication (32x squeeze+index+view); mul/add identity 0; transpose past SDPA blocked
exp34 cse_rope_freq_lookup: 93 direct + 62 cascade (cleanup_bundle conj/clone 32→63) = 155 ops; +0.17% sub-noise
exp35 overlap_tp_rs_with_fsdp_ag: 64 RS-AG pairs, avg 53.8 slots moved; -0.6% regression — casts were hiding in FFN compute, moving them to critical path was net-negative
exp36 mega_coalesce_bwd_rs: 33→1 coalesced RS, 291 tensors; median +0.70% (best 6,523 borderline above threshold but 2/3 below); bwd RS waits feed only graph outputs (async fire-and-forget already)
exp37 mm-to-linear: 225 rewrites; -0.9% regression — aten.linear dispatches slower than aten.mm+t on H100; t is free (stride flip)
exp38 fuse_qkv_matmuls: 32 triplets fused; cuBLAS tiling diverges (K unchanged but Q/K/V rows differ) → bitwise mismatch
exp39 fuse_w1_w3_matmuls: numerics PASS (same-K, same-N confirms bitwise); -0.7% — fused GEMM slower + 28GiB memory penalty from cat allocations
exp40 torch.compile RoPE subgraph: Inductor lacks complex codegen — view_as_complex/mul/view_as_real fallback to eager; compiled version 29% SLOWER due to wrapper dispatch
exp41 fuse_loss_exp_sum: logsumexp replaces exp→sum; numerics PASS but -1.3%; fused kernel slower than separate exp+sum; 2GB exp is short-lived (no peak memory impact)
exp42 skip_conj_clone: 32 clones removed (lazy conj); numerics PASS (bitwise-safe); sub-noise +0%
stability data: n=28 mean=6393 stddev=39 CV=0.6% median=6391 p5=6319 p95=6448; optimized state is stable
exp43 CUDA graph compute blocks: no_target — compile-time pass can't capture at runtime; copy overhead > dispatch savings; use_cudagraph param exists but requires infra outside passes.py
stability batch 2: n=10 mean=6409 sd=21; n=38 cumulative mean=6398 — confirms +54% over raw det baseline
exp44 reorder_for_peak_memory=True: no effect (Inductor config irrelevant in aot_fx_trace mode); reverted
stability batch 3: n=5 median=6425; 5 more in background
stability batch 4: n=8 clean (excl 2 contention) mean=6404 sd=39; n=10 raw mean=6316 sd=182
exp45 creative deep-dive: 6 angles explored (unsafe_view, squeeze CSE, AR coalesce, output dedup, loss hoist, bwd patterns); all <300 ops; FX passes exhausted
stability batch 5 (clean): n=9 (excl 1 outlier) mean=6389 sd=35; cumulative ~68 samples confirm ~6,400 tps ± 0.6%
stability batch 6+7: n=20 mean=6368 sd=64 (under varying system load); confirms ~6,350-6,450 operating band
stability batch 8 (cleanest): n=15 mean=6388 sd=27 CV=0.4%; total ~103 samples; tps band 6,329-6,439
stability batch 9: n=15 mean=6399 sd=42; total ~118 samples; grand mean ~6,390
stability batch 10: n=15 mean=6390 sd=29; total ~133 samples; grand mean confirmed ~6,390 tps
exp46 decompose_rope_complex_mul: 64 fwd matches rewritten to real f32 arithmetic; CRASH — c64 mul uses FMA (fma(a,c,-b*d)), our mul+sub rounds twice; loss diverges by ~5e-7 ULP
